de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification

Class NotificationManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.NotificationManager

  • public class NotificationManager
extends java.lang.Object
    The notificatin manager controls the list of active notification tasks. It receives KeY System events and looks for an appropriate task

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      NotificationManager(KeYMediator mediator, javax.swing.JFrame comp)
      creates an instance of the notification manager

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addNotificationTask(NotificationTask task)
      adds a notification task to this manager
      void handleNotificationEvent(NotificationEvent event)
      dispatches the received notification event and triggers the corresponding task
      boolean inAutoMode() 
      NotificationTask removeNotificationTask(NotificationEventID eventID)
      Removes the NotificationTask with the given NotificationEventID.
      void removeNotificationTask(NotificationTask task)
      removes the given notification task from the list of active tasks
      void setDefaultNotification(javax.swing.JFrame comp)

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • NotificationManager

        public NotificationManager(KeYMediator mediator,
                           javax.swing.JFrame comp)
        creates an instance of the notification manager

    • Method Detail

      • setDefaultNotification

        public void setDefaultNotification(javax.swing.JFrame comp)

      • addNotificationTask

        public void addNotificationTask(NotificationTask task)
        adds a notification task to this manager
        Parameters:
        task - the NotificationTask to be added

      • removeNotificationTask

        public void removeNotificationTask(NotificationTask task)
        removes the given notification task from the list of active tasks
        Parameters:
        task - the task to be removed

      • removeNotificationTask

        public NotificationTask removeNotificationTask(NotificationEventID eventID)
        Removes the NotificationTask with the given NotificationEventID.

        This functionality is used by the Eclipse integration.

        Parameters:
        eventID - The NotificationEventID to remove its NotificationTask.
        Returns:
        The removed NotificationTask or null if none was available.

      • inAutoMode

        public boolean inAutoMode()
        Returns:
        true if the prover is currently in automode

      • handleNotificationEvent

        public void handleNotificationEvent(NotificationEvent event)
        dispatches the received notification event and triggers the corresponding task
        Parameters:
        event -
